title: Letchworth Cold Snap
lead: A cold snap has hit Letchworth with a Z-Score of -1.50. This unusual event has a score of 5.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Letchworth are characterized by a humidity level of 60% and no wind. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 3.0 GG, indicating a moderate need for heating. 
 The Cold Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG, with no cooling required.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely for further developments.
